overall.description: A first-person walk through a stormy nighttime harbor in a video game. The camera moves steadily along weathered wooden docks past moored ships and boats, illuminated by warm sodium street lamps against a dark, cloudy sky. The atmosphere is moody and industrial with maritime architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: open harbor dock with moored ships

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wooden dock, observing the harbor and distant ships

notable_agents.action: large steamship moored in the harbor with lights visible

entered.detail: weathered wooden planks forming the dock surface
dark water of the harbor reflecting minimal light
low wooden fence barrier along the dock edge
tall street lamp casting warm yellow light
wooden posts sticking out of the water for mooring boats

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a stormy night at a harbor dock. The camera walks forward along weathered wooden planks, passing a low wooden barrier on the left. A warm street lamp illuminates the right side while wooden mooring posts are visible in the dark water ahead. A large steamship is moored in the distance.

events.description: camera turns slightly right to follow the dock curve alongside the large ship

agents.ego_description: walking past wooden crates and barrels while approaching the large moored steamship

notable_agents.action: large steamship moored alongside the dock with visible smokestack

entered.detail: stacked wooden crates and barrels along the dockside
wooden ramp or gangway structure leading up to building

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the dock, the camera passes wooden crates and barrels stacked on the left while a large steamship dominates the right side. The wooden mooring posts move closer as the dock curves. The initial street lamp and barrier fade from view behind the camera.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow pier extension with boats moored on both sides

events.description: transitioning from main dock to narrow wooden pier extension

agents.ego_description: walking along the narrow pier with moored boats visible on both sides

notable_agents.action: sailboat with tall masts moored at the pier

entered.detail: wooden building with exterior stairs and illuminated windows
sailing vessel with tall masts docked alongside the pier
small boat moored on the left side of the narrow pier

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a narrower wooden pier extension. A building with exterior stairs appears on the left while a sailboat with tall masts is moored on the right. The camera continues forward along the narrow walkway with water on both sides, passing a small dinghy on the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a stormy harbor dock that transitions from a wide industrial wharf into a narrow pier extension. It begins by walking forward over weathered wooden planks, passing a low barrier and a warm street lamp that casts a glow over mooring posts and a distant steamship. As the camera continues, the view shifts to pass stacked crates and barrels on the left while the massive hull of the steamship dominates the right side of the frame. The scene then narrows as the dock curves, moving past a building with exterior stairs and a sailboat with tall masts. Finally, the camera advances along a slender walkway with water on both sides, passing a small dinghy as it pushes further into the harbor.
